'''dhaguwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabble|rabble]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-g-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabble|rabble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhaguwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhægiwith|dhægiwith]] || [[word:dhægiwij|dhægiwij]] || [[word:dhægiwish|dhægiwish]] || [[word:dhægiwi|dhægiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhaguguwuth|dhaguguwuth]] || [[word:dhaguguwuj|dhaguguwuj]] || [[word:dhaguguwush|dhaguguwush]] || [[word:dhaguguwu|dhaguguwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhaguwuth|dhaguwuth]] || [[word:dhaguwuj|dhaguwuj]] || [[word:dhaguwush|dhaguwush]] || [[word:dhaguwu|dhaguwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhagufwuth|dhagufwuth]] || [[word:dhagufwuj|dhagufwuj]] || [[word:dhagufwush|dhagufwush]] || [[word:dhagufwuf|dhagufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhaguwuthu|dhaguwuthu]] || [[word:dhaguwuju|dhaguwuju]] || [[word:dhaguwushu|dhaguwushu]] || [[word:dhaguwuku|dhaguwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhaguwuth|dhaguwuth]] || [[word:dhaguwuj|dhaguwuj]] || [[word:dhaguwush|dhaguwush]] || [[word:dhaguwu|dhaguwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhaguwuthul|dhaguwuthul]] || [[word:dhaguwujul|dhaguwujul]] || [[word:dhaguwushul|dhaguwushul]] || [[word:dhaguwukul|dhaguwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhaguwuthuthu|dhaguwuthuthu]] || [[word:dhaguwujuju|dhaguwujuju]] || [[word:dhaguwushushu|dhaguwushushu]] || [[word:dhaguwuku|dhaguwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhaguwuthun|dhaguwuthun]] || [[word:dhaguwujun|dhaguwujun]] || [[word:dhaguwushun|dhaguwushun]] || [[word:dhaguwukun|dhaguwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhaguwuthuoro|dhaguwuthuoro]] || [[word:dhaguwujuoro|dhaguwujuoro]] || [[word:dhaguwushuoro|dhaguwushuoro]] || [[word:dhaguwukuoro|dhaguwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
